name: Low protein intake is associated with a major reduction in IGF-1, cancer, and overall mortality in the 65 and younger but not older population.
short_name: Protein intake IGF-1 mortality age boundary
summary: A Cell Metabolism analysis linking low protein intake to lower IGF-1 and reduced mortality associations in adults aged 50 to 65, but not older adults, with mouse tumor-progression experiments supporting the age-dependent boundary.
